title: The MP EVAs About their nature
display_title: The MP EVAs About their nature
wikitext:
[]: The MP EVAs... About their nature?             Quote Post by Replicator » Fri Nov 30, 2012 2:40 pm What were the exact procedures for SEELE's version of Instrumentality with the MP EVAs? It basically consisted of using EVA Unit-01 as the Fruit of Wisdom, and the MP EVAs as the Fruit of Life. In EoE, this is largely depicted as it is supposed to, except why did the MP EVAs arrange in a circle around EVA Unit-01? Wouldn't S2 Engine be sufficient, or are they channeling all of their Engines into EVA Unit-01? Besides, EVA Unit-01 already has an S2 Engine (gained from Zeruel), so then what would be the purpose of teh MP EVAs? Towards the completion of the Third Impact, the MP EVAs impale themselves in their Cores. Is there significance with this act (releasing souls to participate in Instrumentality is possible, but it's unclear if this also applies towards the MP EVAs)?The MP EVAs also appear to have been created solely for the purpose of initiating Instrumentality, but what would have happened to any surviving EVA Units?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Nov 30, 2012 6:37 pm It's not really that complex. Their main purpose was to take out unnecessary factors like Unit 02, use their AT Fields to call down the Lance, and then kill themselves so their inhabitant souls can enter Instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 30, 2012 8:12 pm AuraTwilight wrote: use their AT Fields to call down the Lance

Article: The MP EVAs About their nature
[]: The MP EVAs... About their nature?             Quote Post by Replicator » Fri Nov 30, 2012 2:40 pm What were the exact procedures for SEELE's version of Instrumentality with the MP EVAs? It basically consisted of using EVA Unit-01 as the Fruit of Wisdom, and the MP EVAs as the Fruit of Life. In EoE, this is largely depicted as it is supposed to, except why did the MP EVAs arrange in a circle around EVA Unit-01? Wouldn't S2 Engine be sufficient, or are they channeling all of their Engines into EVA Unit-01? Besides, EVA Unit-01 already has an S2 Engine (gained from Zeruel), so then what would be the purpose of teh MP EVAs? Towards the completion of the Third Impact, the MP EVAs impale themselves in their Cores. Is there significance with this act (releasing souls to participate in Instrumentality is possible, but it's unclear if this also applies towards the MP EVAs)?The MP EVAs also appear to have been created solely for the purpose of initiating Instrumentality, but what would have happened to any surviving EVA Units?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Nov 30, 2012 6:37 pm It's not really that complex. Their main purpose was to take out unnecessary factors like Unit 02, use their AT Fields to call down the Lance, and then kill themselves so their inhabitant souls can enter Instrumentality.
